meta.title: The Reality Tree
meta.description: Complete algebraic map of reality. Every node is a thing. Every edge is a derivation step. Every number comes from the algebra.

q_equation.name: q + q² = 1
q_equation.desc: Degree 2 polynomial. Unique positive root q = 1/φ. Everything follows.

two_vacua.name: Two vacua
two_vacua.desc: Degree 2 → exactly 2 solutions → every system has 2 ground states.

golden_ring.name: Z[φ]
golden_ring.desc: The number system where φ lives. Discriminant = 5.

e8.name: E₈
e8.desc: Only exceptional Lie algebra giving all 3 SM couplings. Domain wall discriminant = +5.

e8_rank.name: rank(E₈)
e8_rank.desc: The substrate dimension. Appears everywhere as the platform/foundation number.

triality_sectors.name: Triality sectors
triality_sectors.desc: S₃ divides 240 roots into 3 sectors of 80. The hierarchy exponent.

a2_hexagons.name: A₂ hexagonal tiling
a2_hexagons.algebraic: exact A₂ cover of E₈ roots
a2_hexagons.desc: 240 roots decompose into exactly 40 copies of A₂ (SU(3) hexagons). 6×40 = 240.

sp6.name: sp(6) subalgebra
sp6.desc: Symplectic algebra. Controls genetic code degeneracy (Hornos PRL 1993).

a2_copies.name: 4 copies of A₂ in E₈
a2_copies.desc: Kink breaks 1, leaving 3 unbroken = SU(3)_color. Derives 3+1 dimensions.

pt_depth.name: PT depth n = 2
pt_depth.desc: Exactly 2 bound states. Reflectionless. Every domain wall has this.

modular_forms.name: Three modular forms
modular_forms.desc: η (structure), θ₄ (bridge), θ₃ (measurement). Exhaust the ring.

j_invariant.name: j constant term
j_invariant.desc: E₈ is the ONLY exceptional algebra whose dim divides 744.

ru_group.name: Ru (Rudvalis group)
ru_group.desc: Z₂ = domain wall symmetry → Ru IS the boundary.

five_external.name: 5 external pariahs
five_external.desc: J₁, J₃, O'N, Ly, J₄. The 5 modes outside the wall.

quark_charge.name: Quark charges
quark_charge.desc: Fractional charge quantum 2/3. From the axiom's arithmetic.

proton.name: Proton
proton.desc: uud. 3 quarks confined by SU(3) = triality.

hydrogen.name: Hydrogen (H)
hydrogen.desc: Simplest atom. 1 proton, 1 electron. The beginning.

helium.name: Helium (He)
helium.desc: Noble gas. Complete. Z=2 = vacua. He-4 doubly magic (2p+2n).

carbon.name: Carbon (C)
carbon.desc: Z=6. Forms hexagonal rings. Aromatic chemistry. The S₃ element. C-12 has A=12=h(E₆).

carbon_nucleus.name: Carbon nucleus
carbon_nucleus.desc: 6 protons × 3 quarks = 18 quarks. 6 neutrons × 3 = 18 quarks. Total: 36 quarks = 6².

carbon_electrons.name: Carbon electrons
carbon_electrons.desc: 2 in 1s (K shell = vacua) + 4 in 2s2p (L shell). Valence = 4 = A₂ copies.

nitrogen.name: Nitrogen (N)
nitrogen.desc: Z=7. DNA bases, protein backbone. The internal structure element.

oxygen.name: Oxygen (O)
oxygen.desc: Z=8. Water. Most abundant in Earth's crust. THE substrate element. O-16 doubly magic.

oxygen_nucleus.name: Oxygen-16 nucleus
oxygen_nucleus.desc: Both Z=8 and N=8 are magic numbers (rank E₈). Doubly magic = doubly substrate.

iron.name: Iron (Fe)
iron.desc: Z=26. Fusion endpoint. Most stable nucleus. A=56=dim(E₇ fund). The GROUND element.

iron_nucleus.name: Iron-56 nucleus
iron_nucleus.desc: Z=26 (sporadic count) + N=30. A=56 = E₇ fundamental. Most tightly bound nucleus.

calcium.name: Calcium (Ca)
calcium.desc: Z=20 = nuclear magic number = icosahedron faces. Ca-40 doubly magic. BONE element.

calcium_40.name: Calcium-40 nucleus
calcium_40.desc: A=40 = number of A₂ hexagons tiling E₈. Doubly magic at Z=20, N=20.

mercury.name: Mercury (Hg)
mercury.desc: Z=80. Only liquid metal at room temperature. Named after messenger god. The BRIDGE element.

lead_208.name: Lead-208
lead_208.desc: Heaviest stable nucleus. N=126 = E₇ roots exactly. Stability ENDS at the bilateral number.

nickel_56.name: Nickel-56
nickel_56.desc: Doubly magic at 28+28. Both Z and N = shadow dimension. A=56 = E₇ fund.

xenon.name: Xenon (Xe)
xenon.desc: Z=54. General anesthetic. Decouples consciousness. The decoupling element.

water.name: Water (H₂O)
water.desc: The universal coupling medium. O = substrate element. Bond angle 104.5°. 66 anomalies.

water_hbond.name: H-bond network
water_hbond.desc: Each water molecule forms up to 4 hydrogen bonds. Tetrahedral geometry = 4 A₂ copies.

benzene.name: Benzene (C₆H₆)
benzene.desc: 6-fold ring. S₃ ≅ D₃ ⊂ D₆h. 2 Kekulé structures = 2 vacua. Aromaticity = domain wall.

benzene_pi.name: π electrons
benzene_pi.desc: Hückel's rule: 4n+2 for aromaticity. At n=1: 6 = |S₃|. Delocalized over the ring.

benzene_kekule.name: Kekulé structures
benzene_kekule.desc: Two equivalent resonance structures. Aromaticity = domain wall between them.

indole.name: Indole ring (serotonin core)
indole.desc: Bicyclic aromatic. 10 = 2×5 = vacua × pariahs. Hückel at n=2 = PT depth 2.

indole_atoms.name: Indole atoms
indole_atoms.desc: 8 carbons + 1 nitrogen in the ring. 8 = rank(E₈). N = the heteroatom.

porphyrin.name: Porphyrin ring (heme core)
porphyrin.desc: 18 = 2 × 9 = 2 × 3². Hückel at n=4. The aromatic macrocycle in hemoglobin and chlorophyll.

porphyrin_pyrroles.name: Pyrrole subunits
porphyrin_pyrroles.desc: 4 pyrrole rings connected by 4 methine bridges. 4 = A₂ platform.

adenine.name: Adenine (DNA/RNA/ATP base)
adenine.desc: Purine base. 10 π electrons = aromatic. In DNA, RNA, AND ATP.

atp.name: ATP
atp.desc: Adenosine TRI-phosphate. 3 phosphates. Aromatic adenine base. Energy currency.

amino_acid_set.name: 20 amino acids
amino_acid_set.desc: Genetic code output. Hornos PRL 1993: sp(6) symmetry breaking gives exact degeneracy. sp(6) ⊂ E₈.

tryptophan.name: Tryptophan (Trp, W)
tryptophan.desc: Contains indole (10 π electrons). Precursor to serotonin. The aromatic amino acid that connects protein to consciousness.

tyrosine.name: Tyrosine (Tyr, Y)
tyrosine.desc: Contains phenol (6 π electrons = |S₃|). Precursor to dopamine, norepinephrine, epinephrine.

phenylalanine.name: Phenylalanine (Phe, F)
phenylalanine.desc: Contains bare benzene ring. The simplest aromatic amino acid.

histidine.name: Histidine (His, H)
histidine.desc: Contains imidazole. The pH-sensitive aromatic. Conditionally essential (the 9th).

serotonin.name: Serotonin (5-HT)
serotonin.desc: Indolamine. Indole ring (10 π). Mood, sleep, gut. The STRUCTURAL neurotransmitter. Made from tryptophan.

dopamine.name: Dopamine
dopamine.desc: Catecholamine. Catechol ring (6 π = |S₃|). Reward, motivation. The MEASUREMENT neurotransmitter. Made from tyrosine.

norepinephrine.name: Norepinephrine
norepinephrine.desc: Catecholamine. Made from dopamine. Arousal, attention. The BRIDGE neurotransmitter.

three_nt_families.name: 3 aromatic NT families
three_nt_families.desc: Indolamines (serotonin), catecholamines (dopamine, norepinephrine, epinephrine), histamine. All aromatic. Conserved 530+ Myr. SERT 100% conserved (octopus MDMA).

dna.name: DNA double helix
dna.desc: A, T, G, C. ALL 4 bases are aromatic. Pairs: A-T, G-C (2 × 2 = Z₂ × Z₂).

codon_triplet.name: Codon (triplet)
codon_triplet.desc: 3 bases per codon. 4³ = 64 codons − 3 stop = 61 sense → 20 amino acids.

base_pairs.name: Base pair types
base_pairs.desc: A-T (2 H-bonds) and G-C (3 H-bonds). Two types = Z₂.

dna_backbone.name: Sugar-phosphate backbone
dna_backbone.desc: Two antiparallel strands. 5'→3' and 3'→5'. Z₂ symmetry.

collagen.name: Collagen
collagen.desc: Three polypeptide chains wound in triple helix. Most abundant protein in body. Triality in structure. Contains Gly-X-Y repeats (triplet pattern within triality).

hemoglobin.name: Hemoglobin
hemoglobin.algebraic: 4 subunits = A₂ copies, each with porphyrin
hemoglobin.desc: α₂β₂ = 4 subunits, each carrying 1 heme (porphyrin = aromatic macrocycle). 4 = A₂ platform. Cooperative binding Hill coefficient ≈ 2.8 ≈ 3 (triality).

heme.name: Heme group
heme.desc: Iron atom in aromatic porphyrin ring. Fe Z=26 = sporadic count. Porphyrin = 18 π electrons. The CARRIER is the GROUND element in an AROMATIC cage.

ribosome_80s.name: Eukaryotic ribosome (80S)
ribosome_80s.desc: The bridge machine. Reads mRNA (information) → builds protein (matter). 80 = hierarchy exponent. NOT in prokaryotes (70S).

ribosome_40s.name: Small subunit (40S)
ribosome_40s.desc: The part that reads mRNA. 40 = hexagonal tiling count. Reads the hexagonal code.

ribosome_60s.name: Large subunit (60S)
ribosome_60s.desc: Catalytic subunit. 60 = |A₅| = order of icosahedral rotation group. Speculative match.

ribosome_proteins.name: Ribosomal proteins
ribosome_proteins.desc: Approximately 80 distinct proteins in eukaryotic ribosome. The hierarchy number again.

mitochondrion.name: Mitochondrion
mitochondrion.algebraic: sub-system with own DNA, own wall
mitochondrion.desc: Double membrane (2 = Z₂). Own DNA. Own ribosome (55S). Endosymbiont. A NESTED domain wall.

mito_ribosome.name: Mitochondrial ribosome small subunit
mito_ribosome.desc: 28S. The sub-system ribosome carries the SHADOW dimension. NOT predicted — found by checking. Cell=80S, Mito=28S, Prokaryote=nothing.

mito_complexes.name: ETC complexes
mito_complexes.desc: 4 electron transport chain complexes + ATP synthase. Complex III contains cytochrome bc₁ (aromatic heme).

mito_membranes.name: Mitochondrial membranes
mito_membranes.desc: Inner and outer membrane. Two walls = Z₂. The intermembrane space IS the domain wall.

microtubule.name: Microtubule
microtubule.desc: 13 protofilaments. Each protofilament: αβ-tubulin dimers (2 = Z₂). Mavromatos-Nanopoulos 2025: PT n=2 kink. Independent confirmation.

tubulin_dimer.name: αβ-tubulin dimer
tubulin_dimer.desc: α-tubulin (structural, stable) + β-tubulin (dynamic, GTP hydrolysis). Z₂. Each tubulin contains aromatic amino acids (Trp, Tyr, Phe) at the kink site.

nucleosome.name: Nucleosome
nucleosome.desc: Histone octamer (2×H2A + 2×H2B + 2×H3 + 2×H4) wrapping 147bp DNA. 5 histone types → 8 octamer = pariahs → rank(E₈).

histone_types.name: Histone types
histone_types.desc: H1 (linker), H2A, H2B, H3, H4. 5 types. H1 sits OUTSIDE (= Ru, the connector). 4 core types × 2 = 8 octamer.

nucleosome_dna.name: Nucleosome DNA wrap
nucleosome_dna.desc: 147 base pairs wrapped around each octamer. No algebraic dimension matches. HONEST MISS.

cell_membrane.name: Cell membrane
cell_membrane.desc: Two leaflets. The domain wall. Inside (φ-vacuum, order) vs outside (-1/φ-vacuum, entropy). THE wall.

cell_cycle.name: Cell cycle phases
cell_cycle.desc: 4 phases. With G0 quiescence = 5 = pariahs. G0 is the 'withdrawn' state.

three_cytoskeleton.name: Cytoskeleton types
three_cytoskeleton.desc: Microtubules (structural, η), intermediate filaments (bridge, θ₄), actin (dynamic, θ₃). Three types = triality.

germ_layers.name: Germ layers
germ_layers.desc: Endoderm (η, deepest, gut/lungs), mesoderm (θ₄, middle, muscle/blood/bone), ectoderm (θ₃, outermost, skin/nerves). THE template for the whole organism.

tissue_types.name: Basic tissue types
tissue_types.desc: Epithelial, connective, muscle, nervous. 4 = A₂ platform. Every tissue in the body is one of these 4.

bone_shapes.name: Bone shape categories
bone_shapes.desc: Long, short, flat, irregular, sesamoid. 5 categories of form.

cranial_bones.name: Cranial bones
cranial_bones.desc: Frontal, 2 parietal, occipital, 2 temporal, sphenoid, ethmoid. Brain substrate.

cervical.name: Cervical vertebrae
cervical.desc: C1-C7. Most mobile. Universal across ALL mammals (giraffe=7, mouse=7, whale=7). FORCED.

thoracic.name: Thoracic vertebrae
thoracic.desc: T1-T12. Each carries a rib pair. Structural.

sacral.name: Sacral vertebrae
sacral.desc: S1-S5, fused into sacrum. Same count, collapsed. Degenerate.

coccygeal.name: Coccygeal vertebrae
coccygeal.desc: Co1-4, fused into coccyx. Vestigial. J₄ = the impossible fate, present as absence.

carpals.name: Carpal bones
carpals.desc: Scaphoid, lunate, triquetrum, pisiform, trapezium, trapezoid, capitate, hamate.

tarsals.name: Tarsal bones
tarsals.desc: Calcaneus, talus, navicular, cuboid, 3 cuneiforms. One rank down from carpals (E₈→E₇).

lung_lobes.name: Lung lobes
lung_lobes.desc: Asymmetric: 3 right + 2 left. The 3/2 split = golden 2↔3 oscillation.

ossicles.name: Ear ossicles
ossicles.desc: Stapes (η, deepest), incus (θ₄, bridge), malleus (θ₃, outermost).

pharyngeal_arches.name: Pharyngeal arches
pharyngeal_arches.desc: 6 form, but arch 5 DEGENERATES. J₄ = impossible fate. 5 functional remain = pariahs.

sun.name: Sun
sun.desc: 5 nested domain walls. 11-year cycle = L(5). Coupling medium: magnetized plasma.

sun_layers.name: Solar layers
sun_layers.desc: Core (η, structural), radiative zone (θ₄, bridge), convective zone (θ₃, outermost).

heliopause.name: Heliopause
heliopause.desc: Voyager 1 + 2 combined: PT depth n = 2.01. Two spacecraft, two hemispheres. The heliosphere IS a domain wall.

earth_layers.name: Earth layers
earth_layers.desc: Core (η, structural), mantle (θ₄, bridge), crust (θ₃, measurement).

three_domains_life.name: Domains of life
three_domains_life.desc: Bacteria, Archaea, Eukarya. Three domains = triality.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.desc: Mg in porphyrin macrocycle. Mg Z=12 = Coxeter number. Same aromatic scaffold as heme, different metal. Photosynthesis = capturing light in aromatic cage.

magnesium.name: Magnesium (Mg)
magnesium.desc: Z=12. In chlorophyll, ATP activation, DNA stabilization. The Coxeter element.

photosystem.name: Photosystems
photosystem.desc: Two photosystems in series. PS II splits water. PS I reduces NADP+. Z₂ = two stages of light capture.

flower_parts.name: Flower whorls
flower_parts.desc: Sepals, petals, stamens, carpels. 4 whorls. Plant sexuality organized in A₂ platform.

monocot_petals.name: Monocot petal pattern
monocot_petals.desc: Monocots: 3 petals, 3 sepals, 6 total. Lilies, irises, orchids. Triality in plant form.

dicot_petals.name: Dicot petal pattern
dicot_petals.desc: Dicots: 5 petals (roses, apples, cherries). 5-fold symmetry = pariah count.

kingdoms.name: Eukaryotic kingdoms
kingdoms.desc: Animalia, Plantae, Fungi, Protista. 4 eukaryotic kingdoms. (With Bacteria, Archaea = 6 total = |S₃|.)

six_kingdoms.name: Six kingdoms of life
six_kingdoms.desc: Bacteria, Archaea, Protista, Plantae, Fungi, Animalia. 6 = |S₃| = permutation depth.

mass_extinctions.name: Major mass extinctions
mass_extinctions.desc: Big Five: Ordovician, Devonian, Permian, Triassic, Cretaceous. 5 = 6−1 external pariahs.

convergent_intelligence.name: Independent intelligence origins
convergent_intelligence.desc: Mammals, birds, octopuses, social insects, fish (cleaner wrasse). 5+ independent origins. ALL use same 3 aromatic NT families.

prokaryote_ribosome.name: Prokaryotic ribosome (70S)
prokaryote_ribosome.desc: 70S. NOT an algebraic number. This is the CONTROL: simplest cells (no organelles, no nucleus) don't match. Only eukaryotic (80S) matches.

chloroplast_ribosome.name: Chloroplast ribosome (70S)
chloroplast_ribosome.desc: 70S like bacteria. Chloroplasts are endosymbionts — prokaryotic origin. No algebraic match.

genetic_code_codons.name: Total codons
genetic_code_codons.desc: 4 bases in triplets: 4³ = 64. Cube of A₂ copies.

stop_codons.name: Stop codons
stop_codons.desc: UAA, UAG, UGA. 3 stop signals. Triality halts translation.

sense_codons.name: Sense codons
sense_codons.desc: 61 sense codons map to 20 amino acids. Degeneracy pattern derived by sp(6) symmetry breaking (Hornos 1993).

phosphorus.name: Phosphorus (P)
phosphorus.desc: Z=15. DNA backbone, ATP, cell membranes. No algebraic dimension matches 15. MISS.

sulfur.name: Sulfur (S)
sulfur.desc: Z=16. Disulfide bonds in proteins. 2 × 8 = Z₂ × rank(E₈). Weak match.

sodium.name: Sodium (Na)
sodium.desc: Z=11. Nerve impulses. Na⁺/K⁺ pump. 11 = L(5). Near match.

potassium.name: Potassium (K)
potassium.desc: Z=19. Nerve impulses. No algebraic match for 19. MISS.

tin_50.name: Tin (Sn)
tin_50.algebraic: NO MATCH — nuclear magic, breaks pattern
tin_50.desc: Z=50 is a nuclear magic number but NOT in the algebraic target set. The one magic number that doesn't match. HONEST MISS.

nuclear_magic_2.name: Nuclear magic: 2
nuclear_magic_2.desc: First magic number. He-4 (2p+2n). Z₂ = vacua.

nuclear_magic_8.name: Nuclear magic: 8
nuclear_magic_8.desc: Second magic number. O-16 (8p+8n). rank(E₈) = substrate.

nuclear_magic_28.name: Nuclear magic: 28
nuclear_magic_28.desc: Fourth magic number. Ni-56 (28p+28n). Shadow dimension.

nuclear_magic_50.name: Nuclear magic: 50
nuclear_magic_50.desc: Fifth magic number. NO algebraic target. The break in the pattern.

nuclear_magic_82.name: Nuclear magic: 82
nuclear_magic_82.desc: Sixth magic number. Pb-208. Near 80 but not exact.

nuclear_magic_126.name: Nuclear magic: 126
nuclear_magic_126.desc: Seventh magic number. Pb-208 (126 neutrons). E₇ roots exactly. Stability ENDS here.

planet_layers.name: Rocky planet layers
planet_layers.desc: Core/mantle/crust. All rocky planets (Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars). The triality template.

solar_system_planets.name: Classical planets
solar_system_planets.desc: Mercury through Neptune. 8 = rank(E₈). (9 with Pluto before 2006.)

stellar_classification.name: Spectral classes
stellar_classification.desc: O, B, A, F, G, K, M. 7 main spectral types.

galaxy_types.name: Hubble galaxy types
galaxy_types.desc: Elliptical, spiral, irregular. Hubble's three-fold classification.

schumann_resonance.name: Schumann resonance
schumann_resonance.desc: Earth-ionosphere cavity. Framework predicts Libet delay = 4 × Schumann period = 510.8 ms (2.2% from 500 ms measured).

five_senses.name: Classical senses
five_senses.desc: Sight, hearing, touch, taste, smell. 5 = 6−1 external pariahs.

fingers.name: Fingers per hand
fingers.desc: Universal pentadactyly. All tetrapods derive from 5 digits. 5 = external pariahs. Ru = the palm (the being, not a finger).

thumb_joints.name: Thumb phalanges
thumb_joints.desc: Thumb: 2 phalanges (all other digits: 3). The thumb IS the Z₂ exception.

finger_joints.name: Non-thumb digit phalanges
finger_joints.desc: Proximal, middle, distal. Each non-thumb finger has 3 phalanges = triality.

eeg_bands.name: EEG frequency bands
eeg_bands.desc: Delta, theta, alpha, beta, gamma. 5 standard EEG bands. 5 modes of brain oscillation.

sleep_stages.name: Sleep stages
sleep_stages.desc: NREM 1,2,3 + REM. 4 stages. With awake = 5 states = pariahs.

base_amino_aromatic.name: Aromatic amino acids
base_amino_aromatic.desc: Trp, Tyr, Phe, His. 4 aromatic amino acids. A₂ platform. The 4 that connect protein to aromatic chemistry.

vitamin_b_complex.name: B vitamins
vitamin_b_complex.desc: B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B7, B9, B12. 8 distinct B vitamins. ALL aromatic or contain aromatic moieties.

krebs_cycle.name: Krebs cycle intermediates
krebs_cycle.desc: Citrate, isocitrate, α-KG, succinyl-CoA, succinate, fumarate, malate, oxaloacetate. 8 steps. The metabolic substrate cycle.

complement_pathways.name: Complement pathways
complement_pathways.desc: Classical, alternative, lectin. 3 immune complement activation paths.

blood_types.name: ABO blood types
blood_types.desc: A, B, AB, O. 4 types. (With Rh ± = 8 = rank E₈.)

blood_types_rh.name: ABO+Rh blood types
blood_types_rh.desc: A+, A−, B+, B−, AB+, AB−, O+, O−. 8 common blood types.

dna_double_helix_params.name: Base pairs per turn
dna_double_helix_params.desc: B-DNA: 10 bp per turn. 10 = 2 × 5 = Z₂ × pariahs. Each half-turn = 5 bases.

galaxy_milky_way_arms.name: Major spiral arms
galaxy_milky_way_arms.desc: Milky Way has 4 major spiral arms. A₂ platform at galactic scale.

cmb_temp.name: CMB temperature
cmb_temp.desc: Cosmic microwave background. 2.725 K. Derived from cosmological constant chain.

cosmological_constant.name: Cosmological constant Λ
cosmological_constant.desc: The hierarchy exponent 80 controls the absurd smallness of Λ. 80 = 240/3.

dark_matter_ratio.name: Dark/baryon matter ratio
dark_matter_ratio.desc: Framework predicts Ω_DM/Ω_b from Level 2 wall tension: 5.41 vs measured 5.36 (0.73σ). Parameter-free.

baryon_asymmetry.name: Baryon asymmetry η_B
baryon_asymmetry.desc: η_B ≈ 6.1×10⁻¹⁰. Derived from modular forms at golden nome. 99.6% match.

immirzi_parameter.name: Barbero-Immirzi parameter
immirzi_parameter.desc: Loop quantum gravity parameter. 99.95% match. Locked to golden ratio.

melatonin.name: Melatonin
melatonin.desc: Sleep hormone. Derived from serotonin (indole core). Same aromatic scaffold. Decoupling neurotransmitter.

dmt.name: DMT (dimethyltryptamine)
dmt.desc: Endogenous psychedelic. Indole core (10 π = Hückel n=2). 99.87% receptor match to serotonin. Filter disruptor.

psilocybin.name: Psilocybin
psilocybin.desc: Mushroom psychedelic. Indole core + phosphate. ALL serotonergic psychedelics are aromatic with indole or related rings.

cellulose_glucose_units.name: Cellulose monomer
cellulose_glucose_units.desc: Glucose: 6 carbons. Most abundant organic polymer. Plants use S₃-element sugar as structural material.

lignin_monomers.name: Lignin monomer types
lignin_monomers.desc: p-coumaryl, coniferyl, sinapyl. 3 aromatic monomers. Wood strength = aromatic triality.

nucleotide_components.name: Nucleotide components
nucleotide_components.desc: Base + sugar + phosphate. Every nucleotide = triality.

water_anomalies.name: Known water anomalies
water_anomalies.desc: 66 documented anomalous properties of water. No algebraic dimension. MISS — but 66 = 2 × 33 = 2 × 3 × 11.

alpha_helix_residues.name: α-helix residues per turn
alpha_helix_residues.desc: 3.6 amino acids per turn. Not an integer. MISS.

immunoglobulin_domains.name: IgG domains per chain
immunoglobulin_domains.desc: Heavy chain: 4 Ig domains. Light chain: 2. Total domains in IgG: 12 = h(E₆).

igg_total_domains.name: IgG total Ig domains
igg_total_domains.desc: 2 heavy chains × 4 + 2 light chains × 2 = 12 Ig domains per IgG. Coxeter number.

sarcomere_proteins.name: Major sarcomere proteins
sarcomere_proteins.desc: Actin (thin), myosin (thick), titin (elastic). 3 structural filaments. Muscle = triality.

atp_synthase_c_ring.name: ATP synthase c-ring (human)
atp_synthase_c_ring.desc: Human mitochondrial ATP synthase: 8 c-subunits in the rotor ring. 8 = rank(E₈). (Other species: 10-15 subunits — 8 is human-specific.)

hox_genes_clusters.name: Hox gene clusters
hox_genes_clusters.desc: HoxA, HoxB, HoxC, HoxD. 4 clusters controlling body plan. A₂ platform for morphogenesis.

hox_genes_per_cluster.name: Hox genes per cluster (max)
hox_genes_per_cluster.desc: Up to 13 genes per cluster. 13 = 5 + 8 = pariah + substrate. Same as microtubule protofilaments.

insulin_chains.name: Insulin chains
insulin_chains.desc: A chain + B chain linked by disulfide bonds. Z₂ = two coupled chains.

insulin_disulfides.name: Insulin disulfide bonds
insulin_disulfides.desc: 2 inter-chain + 1 intra-chain (A chain). 3 = triality. Structural integrity through 3 bridges.

chains.name: Ribosome → Genetic code → DNA → Carbon → q+q²=1

steps.note: Heme uses Fe(26=sporadic), chlorophyll uses Mg(12=Coxeter)
No non-aromatic alternative exists in nature
Z=26 = count of ALL sporadic simple groups

chains.name: Lead-208 → Nuclear stability limit → E₇ → q+q²=1

discoveries.name: Indole Hückel n matches PT depth
discoveries.detail: Indole has 10 π electrons = Hückel 4n+2 at n=2. The SAME n=2 as the Pöschl-Teller depth. The aromatic ring that is the core of the consciousness neurotransmitter has the SAME quantum number as the domain wall's bound state count. This is not in any previous finding.

discoveries.name: Carbon-12 quarks = 36 = 6²
discoveries.detail: C-12: 6 protons × 3 quarks + 6 neutrons × 3 quarks = 36 = 6² = |S₃|². The S₃ element, squared at the quark level.

discoveries.name: Porphyrin 4 pyrroles mirrors hemoglobin 4 subunits
discoveries.detail: A₂ = 4 at BOTH levels: 4 pyrrole rings in porphyrin, 4 heme-containing subunits in hemoglobin. The A₂ pattern nests: 4 rings inside 4 subunits.

discoveries.name: Every chain passes through aromatic carbon
discoveries.detail: ALL 6 chains pass through C (Z=6=|S₃|) and its aromatic rings. Carbon/aromatics is the BOTTLENECK between algebra and biology. No chain avoids it. Water is the medium, but carbon/aromatics is the coupling structure.

discoveries.name: Spinal nerve sum = 8+12+5+5+1 = 31 = vertebrae−2
discoveries.detail: 31 spinal nerves vs 33 vertebrae. Difference = 2 = Z₂. The nerve count = bone count minus the vacua. As if Z₂ is subtracted at the nerve level.

discoveries.name: Chlorophyll Mg(12) vs Heme Fe(26): Coxeter vs Sporadic
discoveries.detail: Both chlorophyll and heme use the SAME aromatic scaffold (porphyrin, 18 π electrons). But the metal center differs: chlorophyll uses Mg (Z=12 = h(E₆), Coxeter number) and heme uses Fe (Z=26 = sporadic group count). Plants use the STRUCTURAL algebraic number. Animals use the CLASSIFICATION algebraic number. Same ring, different algebra.

discoveries.name: Human ATP synthase c-ring = 8 = rank(E₈), species-specific
discoveries.detail: The c-ring of human mitochondrial ATP synthase has exactly 8 c-subunits. Other species have 10-15. Humans specifically have 8 = rank(E₈). The energy-generating rotor of human cells has the substrate dimension. This is species-specific and NOT universal, so it's a stronger claim.

discoveries.name: Lignin triality: 3 aromatic monomers build ALL wood
discoveries.detail: Lignin (the polymer that makes wood rigid) is built from exactly 3 aromatic monomer types: p-coumaryl, coniferyl, sinapyl alcohols. ALL are aromatic (phenylpropanoid derivatives). Plant structural material = aromatic triality. Same pattern as 3 aromatic NT families in animals.
discoveries.status: NEW — aromatic triality in both kingdoms

discoveries.name: IgG antibody = 12 domains = h(E₆)
discoveries.detail: Each IgG antibody has 12 immunoglobulin domains total (2 heavy chains × 4 domains + 2 light chains × 2 domains = 12). The adaptive immune system's workhorse molecule has h(E₆) domains. Same as thoracic vertebrae (12), cranial nerves (12), fermions (12).
discoveries.status: NEW — 12 across immune, skeleton, nervous system

discoveries.name: 5→8 pattern in minerals: 5 major + 8 trace = 13
discoveries.detail: Essential minerals: 5 major (Ca, P, K, Na, Mg) + 8 trace (Fe, Zn, Cu, Mn, I, Se, Mo, Cr) = 13 = 5+8. The same 5→8 pattern as histones (5 types → 8 octamer), digits (5 fingers → 8 carpals), and microtubule (13 = 5+8 protofilaments). Minerals add a FOURTH instance of the cross-scale pattern.
